name: PlayerFinder
description: Organize the players you care about into named groups (with nested sub-groups), then instantly see which of them are online, highlight their nametags, or hide everyone else from view. Import whole MCTiers tier lists (e.g. every T2 sword player) into a group in one command. Client-side & render-only: it reads only the in-game tab list and the public MCTiers API, sends no packets to the server, and grants no combat advantage (no X-ray/ESP — highlighting only recolors the nametags of players you can already see).
